title: Westland Big Tom Tomato Food 1L
features: 3x More, Bigger, Healthier & Tastier Tomatoes (By Weight)
Packed with extra strength nutrients for a bigger yield
Seaweed enriched along with Magnesium and Iron to support plant health
description: From the manufacturer Big Tom Super Tomato Food Our new and improved Big Tom Super Tomato Food will give you 3 x more*, bigger and taster tomatoes for your best season yet. With our PlantSense Technology, it means there is just the right amount of nutrients and a water management system perfected to work with peat free growbags and planters. Including iron and magnesium to give you greener plants, it is also rich in seaweed for healthy root growth giving you great tasting tomatoes. *By weight vs. unfed tomato plants Key Benefits 3 x more, bigger, tastier tomatoes* Wetting agent to increase nutrient uptake Extra magnesium and iron to support plant health Root growth boosting bio stimulant Easy squeeze measuring doser Why use Big Tom Super Tomato Food gives you 3x more*, bigger healthier & tastier tomatoes. PlantSense Technology: Greener Plants - added iron and magnesium Nutrients Optimised - For great tasting tomatoes Rich in Seaweed - For healthy root growth Easier and faster to water - with minimal surface run off and no waste Optimised for Peat Free Planters *By weight vs unfed tomato plants How & When to Use Shake well before use and gently squeeze the bottle Fill the inner part of the cap until the line (10ml) Pour two caps (20ml) into your watering can (with 4.5L/1 gal of water) Feed every 4-5 days (greenhouse) or 10-14 days (outdoor) from the first truss set** Keep plants consistently watered and fed, avoid wetting foliage or overdosing **Truss set is when the flowers start to swell into green fruit. If yellowing is seen before truss set, feed weekly with 10ml per 4.5L/1 gal of water. What to Expect 3 x more* bigger, tastier crops of juicy tomatoes Improved root growth for plant stability Use BIG TOM feed with our BIG TOM peat free planter to get even more, bigger, tastier tomatoes. *By weight vs unfed tomato plants Top Tips Use with Westland Big Tom Tomato Planter for even bigger, tastier tomatoes. Don’t allow tomato plants to dry out as this can contribute to the fruit splitting when re-watered. Remove any side shoots to improve airflow around the plant. Do not exceed the appropriate application rate. Increasing the dosage may result in damage to your plants Store in a dry, frost free place away from children, pets and foodstuff Wash hands and exposed skin after use. Gloves are recommended when handling this product Children and pets can continue to use treated areas immediately after application

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye protection when handling. Do not eat, drink, or smoke when using this product. In case of accidental contact, wash affected areas thoroughly with water. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately and show the container.
